description_long: This is a compact, double-burner induction cooker with a sleek, curved rectangular body finished in a glossy teal color. The cooktop features two circular black induction heating zones, each with a set of sturdy, angular pan supports. The front panel is equipped with several control knobs and buttons, clearly labeled and symmetrically arranged, along with a central brand logo reading 'KOKO'. The surface appears smooth and reflective, with subtle highlights indicating a hard, durable material, likely metal or high-grade plastic. The cooker's base is slightly elevated on small feet, providing stability and ventilation. No visible power cord or digital display is present, and the overall design is modern and functional, suitable for portable or countertop use in urban environments.
description: A modern, teal double-burner induction cooker with black pan supports, labeled controls, and a central 'KOKO' logo. The surface is glossy and smooth, with a compact, curved design.
description_view_0: Front view showing both burners, the 'KOKO' logo, and all control knobs and buttons clearly.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the cooker and the profile of the burners and pan supports.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the cooker, with no visible controls or branding.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the side profile and burner arrangement.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is located on the front face, featuring two rotary knobs and several small push buttons symmetrically arranged on either side of the central 'KOKO' logo. Each knob and button is labeled with icons or text, and there are no visible indicator lights or digital displays.
